targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(captured_at, '1h'), max(cache_read_input_tokens) as cache_read_tokens, max(cache_creation_input_tokens) as cache_creation_tokens from session_snapshots where $__timeFilter(captured_at) group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Cache Read Vs Cache Creation Over Time

targets.rawSql: select prompt_id, idle_gap_before_ms, cache_efficiency_score, total_cache_read_tokens, total_cache_creation_tokens from derived_prompt_facts where $__timeFilter(prompt_started_at) order by idle_gap_before_ms desc limit 200

panels.title: Idle Gap Length Vs Cache Efficiency

targets.rawSql: select session_id, prompt_id, prompt_started_at, idle_gap_before_ms, total_cache_read_tokens, total_cache_creation_tokens, total_cost_usd from derived_prompt_facts where $__timeFilter(prompt_started_at) and idle_gap_before_ms > 600000 and total_cache_read_tokens = 0 and total_cache_creation_tokens > 0 order by prompt_started_at desc limit 200

select session_id, prompt_id, prompt_started_at, idle_gap_before_ms, total_cost_usd from derived_prompt_facts where $__timeFilter(prompt_started_at) and idle_gap_before_ms > 300000 order by total_cost_usd desc limit 100

select session_id, prompt_id, prompt_started_at, total_cache_read_tokens, total_cache_creation_tokens, cache_efficiency_score from derived_prompt_facts where $__timeFilter(prompt_started_at) and total_cache_read_tokens < 10 and total_cache_creation_tokens > 1000 order by total_cache_creation_tokens desc limit 100
